slides.headline: Rebuild 2 is up next
slides.subheader: 48 hours in Helsinki, the summer camp where we teach each other how to build, design, and scale social platforms.

slides.headline: Gatherings
slides.subheader: Three 48-hour gatherings across 2026, tailored to the entrepreneurs building the next generation of social platforms. Designed to connect, build, and act.

slides.headline: Directory
slides.subheader: Rebuild is building a directory of every social platform in Europe. More than 300 platforms identified so far. Who are we missing?
